ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "reported_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction was reported */,
  "exercisable_expiration" TEXT /* Exercisable expiration date (if applicable) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company involved in the transaction */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "insider_relationship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insider relationship */,
  "shares_traded" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded in the transaction */,
  "conversion_price" TEXT /* Conversion price of the shares (if applicable) */,
  "shares_owned" TEXT /* Number of shares owned by the insider (e.g., 610,124(Direct)) */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the filing associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" TEXT /* Total monetary value of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Completed, Pending, Canceled) */,
  "transaction_source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction (e.g., Manual, API, System) */,
  "audit_trail" TEXT /* Detailed audit trail of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_insider_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("insider_relationship_id") REFERENCES insider_relationships ("insider_relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "cfo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CFO */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* Date of the fiscal year end */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insider_relationships" (
  "insider_relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insider relationship */,
  "insider_name" TEXT /* Name of the insider */,
  "insider_title" TEXT /* Title or position of the insider within the company */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the insider is associated with */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., CEO, COO) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the insider started their relationship with the company */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the insider's relationship ended (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the relationship (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the insider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the insider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insider_relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insider_relationships_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filings" (
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing */,
  "filing_type" TEXT /* Type of the filing (e.g., Form 4, Form 8-K) */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the filing was submitted */,
  "filing_status" TEXT /* Status of the filing (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "filing_url" TEXT /* URL to access the full filing document */,
  "filing_version" TEXT /* Version of the filing */,
  "filing_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the filing (e.g., Regular, Amendment) */,
  "amended_filing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original filing if this is an amendment */,
  "filing_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the filing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "transaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., Exercise, Tax Withholding, Option Award) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regulator, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction detail */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the detail belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Notes related to the transaction */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments on the transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the detail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the detail was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the detail */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_details_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_details_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_details_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
